title: FTB Quests: Item Rewards
description: Adds placeholder items for use in FTB Quests — ideal for rewards, tokens, and custom crafting.
body:
FTB Quests: Item Rewards is the missing link for any quest pack. Instead of handing out random filler items, you can now create purpose-built Items/Rewards that integrate seamlessly with your questlines.



🎁 Reward Items: Give players custom items that feel unique and purposeful.

⚒️ Crafting Components: Use Items in recipes to lock progression behind quests.

🗝️ Progression Keys: Control access to powerful items, machines, or entire dimensions.

🧩 Simple & Lightweight: No features to get in the way — just clean, customizable items.



ONLY A Few Of All The Items Added:
![Only some of the items added](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ed08f4b2092a42310555b3e2df6379edff971d8.png)


If you’re building a professional-quality pack, this mod is essential. Stop relying on vanilla items and start giving your players rewards that actually mean something.



More Comming Soon
